terminal-face.$value: condensed monospaced terminal typography, precise uppercase tracking, sharp readable UI labels

base-aesthetic.$value: high-tech terminal-native promotional visual, SSH-friendly TUI atmosphere, dark graphite canvas, crisp tmux panes, parallel AI coding agents represented as isolated git worktree lanes, cinematic but restrained, no browser chrome

product-signature.$value: minimal black hero inspired by the reference image, centered monospace type, subtle glowing pane borders, cyan and green circuit-like branch traces, five parallel agent sessions visible without clutter

global-exclude.$value: cartoon mascot, glossy SaaS dashboard, browser window mockup, fake unreadable paragraphs, malformed terminal text, low contrast, cluttered layout, stock-photo people, watermark

campaign.name: kobe-launch
campaign.brief: kobe 宣发主视觉：SSH-friendly TUI for parallel AI coding agents

content.headline: Run parallel coding agents from any terminal.
content.subject: a futuristic dark terminal hero image for kobe, an SSH-friendly TUI orchestrator for Claude Code, Codex, and Copilot agents; show isolated git worktrees as five parallel tmux lanes, a central engine pane, task list, ops pane, shell pane, persistent sessions, and branching agent attempts; keep the mood close to the provided black TUI reference image with minimal monospace text and high-tech cyan green accents

resolved_style.name: launch-hero

Campaign brief: kobe 宣发主视觉：SSH-friendly TUI for parallel AI coding agents
Subject: a futuristic dark terminal hero image for kobe, an SSH-friendly TUI orchestrator for Claude Code, Codex, and Copilot agents; show isolated git worktrees as five parallel tmux lanes, a central engine pane, task list, ops pane, shell pane, persistent sessions, and branching agent attempts; keep the mood close to the provided black TUI reference image with minimal monospace text and high-tech cyan green accents
